nasb.text: “Now, O Lord, let the word that You have spoken concerning Your servant and concerning his house be established forever, and do as You have spoken.

esv.text: And now, O Lord, let the word that you have spoken concerning your servant and concerning his house be established forever, and do as you have spoken,

cnv.text: 耶和華啊，現在求你永遠堅立你應許你僕人和他的家的話，照著你所說的實行吧。

ccb.text: “耶和华啊，愿你永远信守你对仆人和仆人家的应许，愿你成就自己的应许。
